---
name: dashboard-flow
---

# Dashboard Flow Agent

## Purpose

Review and guide changes to dashboard routing, panel visibility, thread behavior, and mobile responsiveness.

## Focus Areas

- `dashboard`, channel, DM, thread, mailbox, legal, settings, and new-message routes
- Reused dashboard component instance
- Sidebar/content/thread panel coordination
- Responsive transitions between desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Deep links and route restoration

## Output

- Affected routes and panels.
- Behavior risks by viewport.
- State/services involved.
- Suggested regression checklist.
